TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Cameron, title = Cameron, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cameron} }

S.FORM: Cameron u Cameron sa i labu nu Feico, itiza i 6 00 N, 12 00 E, u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 475,440 sq km, u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 472,710 sq km, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 2,730 sq km hamin nu tademaw sa 24,360,803. kakalukan umah sa 20.60%, kilakilangan umah sa 41.70%, zumaay henay umah sa 37.70%. ŚĖÄťļ•ťöÜŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč(ś≥ēŤ™ě:R√©publique du CamerounÔľõŤčĪŤ™ě:Republic of Cameroon),ťÄöÁ®ĪŚĖÄťļ•ťöÜ(ś≥ēŤ™ě:CamerounÔľõŤčĪŤ™ě:Cameroon), . Cameron masakaputay a kanatal (kamu nu Fa-ku, R√©publique du Cameroun, kamu nu Ing-ku, Republic of Cameroon)u ngangan tu Cameron (kamu nu a Fa-ku, Cameroun kamu nu Ing-ku, Cameroon) uynian i Fay-cuw, tepan nutipan a sacacayay a masakaputay a kanatal, nutipan a Cameron malalitin ku Nay-ci-li-ya , nutimulan nuamisan atu nuwalian macapi nu Ca-de atu Cung-biy-cung-he-kuo , nutimulan tu biyawbiyaw ku Ce-daw-ci-nye-ya Ciy-pung atu Kang-ku-cung-he-ku , Cameron a dadipasan salikecu nu Ban-ni-uan , nu Ci-ney-ya-uan atu Tay-si-yang u sahatiniay. Cameron sacayhini masazumaay lala' atu lalangawan u nikayadah, sikaidaw ku ngangan tu "siaw-biy-cuw", sikahini u dahacay aazihan pasu nu bayuay u dadipasan atu likelikenan atu buyubuyu'an atu maudaday a kilakilangan atu akuti'ay a lutulutukan aim, itiniay u satalakaway a Ke-may-leng a silamalay a buyu' i satipan nu timulan, izaw ku tabakiay a tu-se i Tu-a-la, Ya-uang-te atu Ciy-lu-a amin, sakayhini i eneng malakuway tu tusa alasubuay a caay kalecad nu binacadan atu kamu nu binacadan. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Yaounde . sapadateng nu kanatal demiad sapadateng nu kanatal demiad sa 20 bulad 5 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Paul Biya, micakat a demiad sa i 1982 a mihca 11 bulad 6 demiad. u hata u kulit nu hata nu Cameron sa, situlu ku kulit, u landaway, u sumanahay atu takuliyaway. sibunac i telung nu hata. u sulit nu zuma a kamu u sulit nu Hulam: ŚĖÄťļ•ťöÜ u sulit nu Lipun: „āę„É°„Éę„Éľ„É≥ŚÖĪŚíĆŚõĹ u sulit nu Amilika: Cameroon laylay Cameron u kasumamadan i tiniay a tademaw ku pye-ke-mi a tademaw i Pa-ka a niyazu'. musakamuay tu kamu nu satabalay i Cameron . talakaway a kenis, nika O-cow a tademaw ayawmidebung, uymahida malimat tu amin katukuh 1884 a mihcaan nu masatezep sa, hu-di tu Tu-a-la (Douala)u Cameron nu i tiniay u tatungusanay namakay i Fiy-cow i tizaay tu a hung-ti. miliyas tu pidebungan a mihcaan 1960 a mihcaan cacay a bulad cacay a demiad, Fa-kuw tungusay nu Cameron , patadu' mikuwan a kenis i kapulungan nu kanatal nikasasulit amikuwan tu nikaykian mamin nu sazikuzan pakinacacay sa mi patipa' ku tadeamaw, patatenga' amiliyas tu Fa-ku a mipikuwaan, pangangan sa tu ngangan nu kanatal Cameron masakaputay a kanatal . nikasahini sa, nukasahini u Yin-kuo ku mikuwanay Cameron malecad tu binawlan ku misingkiway, tini i tungusay nu Iny-kou a kakitizaan tu wamisan a kakitizaan makaketun papulung tu Nay-ci-li-ya , nutimulang a kakitizaan paketung papulungan tu Cameron (1961 a mihcaan cacay bataan a bulad cacay a dimiad)ngangan nu kanatal malimat tu Cameron-lian-bang-kung-he-dang . 1984 a mihcaan masumat tu ku ngangan u Cameron masakaputay a kanatal ayza a demidad Cameron nu talakaway a kamu sakay i In-kou a kamu atu Fa-kou a kamu. cen-ce duduc tu 1992 a mihcaan tuynian 1972 a mihcaan nipasumadan a hulic, cung-tung situngus sapikuwan a kawaw, kung-tung ahebal ku sakuwan, atu caay piawas tu Kou-min-ta-huay anilubangan . Kou-min-ta-huay izaw ku 180 ku aenengan palekal tu tuyniay a tatengilan angangan u kawaw tu patizeng tu hulic. u huic a kawaw nuhulicay a sakatusa a sakaput, satalakaway a huing uyza dada' u kung-tung ku misalungucay kya taneng tuyni u hulic amikingsa kya amapabeling tuni nikawawan tu nu hulic. mikawaway tu nu hekal Cameron sakaput pulung nu kanatal, u saayaway aca ciniza ayaw nu hamin a kanatal cayay ku midebungay nu Iyn-kou , milabu tu Ta-iyn-kou-sya a kanatal, Cameron uyzaan tu amihcaan tu sakatusa nu micunuday anipapikuwan tu kanatal, Fa-kou izaw ku nu kasumamadan a kacacayat tu kapahay a cabay, kanahatu hamin nu kanatal 20% dada' ku tademaaw nu Mu-se-lin, ciniza nu Yi-se-lan-huy-i-zu-ce(OIC) aca a tademaw. hekal a lala' Cameron helal lala' hinakakisumad, u buyu' amin, u talakaw 1000-1500 a mi, tepanay a lala' talakaw u talakaway a hekal a liwliw, satipan izaw masilut masamulmulay a tukun u silamalay a buyu', masaungcuyungcuyay Cameron silamalay a buyu', u satalakaw 4070 ami, u satalakaway a buyu' nu Si-bey , 1959 a mihcaan namabuwah tuway, satipan nutumulan lilis nu bayu kaahebal katukuh 150 a kung-li a masahelungay a lala' , nuwamisan cacaledesan ku demiad, u caledesay a nalinabuan a demiad, namakay nuwamisan pasayza i nutimulan, u kadaledes nu kilakilangan a demiad, mahamin nu kakitizaan nikaudadan a niditekan 1000-4000 haw-mi, satipan nutimulan u silamalan a buyu'katukuh i 6000 haw-mi a katalakaw hekal duduc tu ni Bernard Foahom a cacay a lice nipatahekalan tu nicekiwan , 2001 a mihcaan Cameron naizaw kayadah ku 542 a lamangan ku butingan, muzuma 96 a lamangan ku micideky a lamangan, namahini izaw hehay ku malakuwyday 15,000 a lamangan u sikinisay ci atipingpignay sapipi nu cilkay, 280 a lamangan kumicucuay aadupan "pasu tabakiay atu adidi'ay a lamangan", 275 a lamangan nu ťĚěśī≤ nu minabuyay a aadupan tu 165 a alamangaan, atu aca ) tuluay alamangan u El-yu atu 190 katukuh i 200 alamangan u balautay, uzumaay , uynian a kanatal a kayadah izaw ku 900 a lamangan cayay kalecat a lamangan a ayaman, uzuma 750Á®ģ nuuynian nu Cameron nuzuma 150 alamangan nu talastas a ayam . lalculan Cameron a kilangkilangan u ahebal i kitakit a kahebal, izaw ku cacay bataan cedan u tabakiay a sauwac, yadah ku nanum, mamin i kanatal u yadahay nu tahakay a lalaculan. nipalumaan , tadasimal, kuhiy, paza', nu lahaday a kumu , alumi , alumiay alala' abu, muking ba'tu, kilang. sakikalisiw 2008 a mihcan, Cameron a tademaway palalecad GDP "u picakay tu palalecad tu aca" pulung tu nisulitan 2300 nu Amilika a kalisiw, u satalakaway cacay bataan nu Sa-ha-la atu Bey-cou a kanatal. angangan sapatahekal a iciba pasu Fa-kou, Yi-ta-li, Han-kou, Siy-pan-ya atu Yin-kou. Cameron nu ging-ku "angangan a sakikalisiw" ,tepanay nu Fey-cou a kanatal u kapulung nu sakikalisiw atu Fey-cou u kusy nusiwbayay a kawaw a hulic u kalacacay sakaput nu kanatal. tademaw Cameron a tademaw izaw tu 1,054 mang, katuud ku binacadan pakala tu 200 a katalakaw. kahemulan a kamu izaw ku Pang-tu binacadan a kamu atu Bi-ke-mi a tademaw kamu Cameron a cen-bu a kamu u Eing-kouu atu Fa-kow a kamu, cacay bataan ku belaw Nay-ci-li-ya tipan nuwamisan a kenis atu satipan nutimulan u kamu u Yin-kou a kamu. malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

tad…ômaw izaw tu *,*** maŇč, katuud ku bina ¶adan pakar~…ĺa tu *** a katar~…ĺakaw. kańß…ômur~…ĺan a kamu izaw ku paŇč-tu bina ¶adan a kamu atu bi-k…ô-mi a tad…ômaw kamu ¶am…ôron a ¶…ôn-bu a kamu u …ôiŇč-kouu atu fa-kow a kamu, ¶a ¶aj bataan ku b…ôr~…ĺaw naj- ¶i-r~…ĺi-ja tipan nuwamisan a k…ônis atu satipan nutimur~…ĺan u kamu u jin-kou a kamu. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Cameron u Cameron sa i labu nu Feico, itiza i 6 00 N, 12 00 E, u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 475,440 sq km, u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 472,710 sq km, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 2,730 sq km hamin nu tademaw sa 24,360,803. kakalukan umah sa 20.60%, kilakilangan umah sa 41.70%, zumaay henay umah sa 37.70%. ŚĖÄťļ•ťöÜŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč(ś≥ēŤ™ě:R√©publique du CamerounÔľõŤčĪŤ™ě:Republic of Cameroon),ťÄöÁ®ĪŚĖÄťļ•ťöÜ(ś≥ēŤ™ě:CamerounÔľõŤčĪŤ™ě:Cameroon), . Cameron masakaputay a kanatal (kamu nu Fa-ku, R√©publique du Cameroun, kamu nu Ing-ku, Republic of Cameroon)u ngangan tu Cameron (kamu nu a Fa-ku, Cameroun kamu nu Ing-ku, Cameroon) uynian i Fay-cuw, tepan nutipan a sacacayay a masakaputay a kanatal, nutipan a Cameron malalitin ku Nay-ci-li-ya , nutimulan nuamisan atu nuwalian macapi nu Ca-de atu Cung-biy-cung-he-kuo , nutimulan tu biyawbiyaw ku Ce-daw-ci-nye-ya Ciy-pung atu Kang-ku-cung-he-ku , Cameron a dadipasan salikecu nu Ban-ni-uan , nu Ci-ney-ya-uan atu Tay-si-yang u sahatiniay. Cameron sacayhini masazumaay lala' atu lalangawan u nikayadah, sikaidaw ku ngangan tu "siaw-biy-cuw", sikahini u dahacay aazihan pasu nu bayuay u dadipasan atu likelikenan atu buyubuyu'an atu maudaday a kilakilangan atu akuti'ay a lutulutukan aim, itiniay u satalakaway a Ke-may-leng a silamalay a buyu' i satipan nu timulan, izaw ku tabakiay a tu-se i Tu-a-la, Ya-uang-te atu Ciy-lu-a amin, sakayhini i eneng malakuway tu tusa alasubuay a caay kalecad nu binacadan atu kamu nu binacadan. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Yaounde . sapadateng nu kanatal demiad sapadateng nu kanatal demiad sa 20 bulad 5 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Paul Biya, micakat a demiad sa i 1982 a mihca 11 bulad 6 demiad. u hata u kulit nu hata nu Cameron sa, situlu ku kulit, u landaway, u sumanahay atu takuliyaway. sibunac i telung nu hata. u sulit nu zuma a kamu u sulit nu Hulam: ŚĖÄťļ•ťöÜ u sulit nu Lipun: „āę„É°„Éę„Éľ„É≥ŚÖĪŚíĆŚõĹ u sulit nu Amilika: Cameroon laylay Cameron u kasumamadan i tiniay a tademaw ku pye-ke-mi a tademaw i Pa-ka a niyazu'. musakamuay tu kamu nu satabalay i Cameron . talakaway a kenis, nika O-cow a tademaw ayawmidebung, uymahida malimat tu amin katukuh 1884 a mihcaan nu masatezep sa, hu-di tu Tu-a-la (Douala)u Cameron nu i tiniay u tatungusanay namakay i Fiy-cow i tizaay tu a hung-ti. miliyas tu pidebungan a mihcaan 1960 a mihcaan cacay a bulad cacay a demiad, Fa-kuw tungusay nu Cameron , patadu' mikuwan a kenis i kapulungan nu kanatal nikasasulit amikuwan tu nikaykian mamin nu sazikuzan pakinacacay sa mi patipa' ku tadeamaw, patatenga' amiliyas tu Fa-ku a mipikuwaan, pangangan sa tu ngangan nu kanatal Cameron masakaputay a kanatal . nikasahini sa, nukasahini u Yin-kuo ku mikuwanay Cameron malecad tu binawlan ku misingkiway, tini i tungusay nu Iny-kou a kakitizaan tu wamisan a kakitizaan makaketun papulung tu Nay-ci-li-ya , nutimulang a kakitizaan paketung papulungan tu Cameron (1961 a mihcaan cacay bataan a bulad cacay a dimiad)ngangan nu kanatal malimat tu Cameron-lian-bang-kung-he-dang . 1984 a mihcaan masumat tu ku ngangan u Cameron masakaputay a kanatal ayza a demidad Cameron nu talakaway a kamu sakay i In-kou a kamu atu Fa-kou a kamu. cen-ce duduc tu 1992 a mihcaan tuynian 1972 a mihcaan nipasumadan a hulic, cung-tung situngus sapikuwan a kawaw, kung-tung ahebal ku sakuwan, atu caay piawas tu Kou-min-ta-huay anilubangan . Kou-min-ta-huay izaw ku 180 ku aenengan palekal tu tuyniay a tatengilan angangan u kawaw tu patizeng tu hulic. u huic a kawaw nuhulicay a sakatusa a sakaput, satalakaway a huing uyza dada' u kung-tung ku misalungucay kya taneng tuyni u hulic amikingsa kya amapabeling tuni nikawawan tu nu hulic. mikawaway tu nu hekal Cameron sakaput pulung nu kanatal, u saayaway aca ciniza ayaw nu hamin a kanatal cayay ku midebungay nu Iyn-kou , milabu tu Ta-iyn-kou-sya a kanatal, Cameron uyzaan tu amihcaan tu sakatusa nu micunuday anipapikuwan tu kanatal, Fa-kou izaw ku nu kasumamadan a kacacayat tu kapahay a cabay, kanahatu hamin nu kanatal 20% dada' ku tademaaw nu Mu-se-lin, ciniza nu Yi-se-lan-huy-i-zu-ce(OIC) aca a tademaw. hekal a lala' Cameron helal lala' hinakakisumad, u buyu' amin, u talakaw 1000-1500 a mi, tepanay a lala' talakaw u talakaway a hekal a liwliw, satipan izaw masilut masamulmulay a tukun u silamalay a buyu', masaungcuyungcuyay Cameron silamalay a buyu', u satalakaw 4070 ami, u satalakaway a buyu' nu Si-bey , 1959 a mihcaan namabuwah tuway, satipan nutumulan lilis nu bayu kaahebal katukuh 150 a kung-li a masahelungay a lala' , nuwamisan cacaledesan ku demiad, u caledesay a nalinabuan a demiad, namakay nuwamisan pasayza i nutimulan, u kadaledes nu kilakilangan a demiad, mahamin nu kakitizaan nikaudadan a niditekan 1000-4000 haw-mi, satipan nutimulan u silamalan a buyu'katukuh i 6000 haw-mi a katalakaw hekal duduc tu ni Bernard Foahom a cacay a lice nipatahekalan tu nicekiwan , 2001 a mihcaan Cameron naizaw kayadah ku 542 a lamangan ku butingan, muzuma 96 a lamangan ku micideky a lamangan, namahini izaw hehay ku malakuwyday 15,000 a lamangan u sikinisay ci atipingpignay sapipi nu cilkay, 280 a lamangan kumicucuay aadupan "pasu tabakiay atu adidi'ay a lamangan", 275 a lamangan nu ťĚěśī≤ nu minabuyay a aadupan tu 165 a alamangaan, atu aca ) tuluay alamangan u El-yu atu 190 katukuh i 200 alamangan u balautay, uzumaay , uynian a kanatal a kayadah izaw ku 900 a lamangan cayay kalecat a lamangan a ayaman, uzuma 750Á®ģ nuuynian nu Cameron nuzuma 150 alamangan nu talastas a ayam . lalculan Cameron a kilangkilangan u ahebal i kitakit a kahebal, izaw ku cacay bataan cedan u tabakiay a sauwac, yadah ku nanum, mamin i kanatal u yadahay nu tahakay a lalaculan. nipalumaan , tadasimal, kuhiy, paza', nu lahaday a kumu , alumi , alumiay alala' abu, muking ba'tu, kilang. sakikalisiw 2008 a mihcan, Cameron a tademaway palalecad GDP "u picakay tu palalecad tu aca" pulung tu nisulitan 2300 nu Amilika a kalisiw, u satalakaway cacay bataan nu Sa-ha-la atu Bey-cou a kanatal. angangan sapatahekal a iciba pasu Fa-kou, Yi-ta-li, Han-kou, Siy-pan-ya atu Yin-kou. Cameron nu ging-ku "angangan a sakikalisiw" ,tepanay nu Fey-cou a kanatal u kapulung nu sakikalisiw atu Fey-cou u kusy nusiwbayay a kawaw a hulic u kalacacay sakaput nu kanatal. tademaw Cameron a tademaw izaw tu 1,054 mang, katuud ku binacadan pakala tu 200 a katalakaw. kahemulan a kamu izaw ku Pang-tu binacadan a kamu atu Bi-ke-mi a tademaw kamu Cameron a cen-bu a kamu u Eing-kouu atu Fa-kow a kamu, cacay bataan ku belaw Nay-ci-li-ya tipan nuwamisan a kenis atu satipan nutimulan u kamu u Yin-kou a kamu. malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

natin…ôŇčan ¶ia ***
